content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Auto leading (+1.80%), Pharma (+1.21%), PSU Banks (+1.31%) and Bank Nifty (+1.00%) all green. VIX cooling -3% suggests risk-on. Q4 results season delivering strong beats (M&M +48% PAT, Bandhan +68%, Navin +124%, Sobha +124%). Book is well-deployed at 66% with multiple winners across sectors.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.5% winner. SL already at 1040.66 (well above entry 984, breakeven+) — that already locks ~5.7% profit. Day's low 1048.30 holds above SL. Keeping SL where it is with 1% room below CMP 1058 is appropriate; tightening further into 1052 pivot zone would risk noise stopout. Holding for target 1110 (R1: 1069.58 then breakout zone)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor, -1% only. Gold +1.16% today on safe-haven flows. SL 119 gives ample room; target 135 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At ATH zone (52-w high 1748.60). +1.9% gain, SL already at 1715 = breakeven+. CMP 1732.50 vs SL 1715 = 1.0% gap — exactly at trail-gap floor. Not tightening further would let dividend/AGM catalysts play out. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Banking sector firm, +0.77% today. -0.3% vs entry. SL 206 (1% below CMP 208.36) appropriate, target 222 intact. Q4 turnaround thesis (+68% PAT, GNPA -140bps) playing out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defence breakout, +2.21% today, +1.7% vs entry. SL at entry 4575; trailing to 4600 (entry+25, 1.3% below CMP 4660) locks small gain while honoring 1% trail-gap floor. May 14 board meeting upcoming — within 3-session binary window approaches; will reassess closer. Target 4875 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.9% but Q4 stellar (+124% PAT, net-debt negative, Rs 6 dividend). SL 1420 holds; CMP 1440 has 1.4% room. Today's low 1434.30 close to SL — watch but thesis intact. No tightening below stored level allowed; current SL is already the floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% gain. SL 6950 already at breakeven+ (entry 6900). CMP 7052 vs SL 6950 = 1.4% gap, within trail-gap floor. Q4 was a blowout (+124% PAT, +61% CDMO). Target 7400 intact. Keeping SL — tightening further into 6950 would risk noise stop given today's low 6978."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.1%). SL 820 = 2% below CMP 837. Q4 board meeting mid-late May = binary catalyst pending; will reassess as date firms. Naval expansion + railway capex tailwind. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%. Q4 PAT +30% YoY, lending book Rs 2.07 lakh cr (+32% YoY). SL 358 (2.5% below CMP 366) appropriate. Hold for target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "FY26 earnings call May 8 = 2 trading sessions away — BINARY EVENT WINDOW. Position is small (~4.3% of capital) and SL 1675 is 3% below CMP 1727.90, capping tail. Per binary-event rule (b)+(c): position is already <5% capital and SL within ~3% — acceptable to hold through. Will not add."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.0%). Q4 +18% PAT, +22% revenue. SL 800 (2.3% below CMP). Hold for target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "new_target": 3430.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.28% sector-leading day on record FY26 PAT (+48.5%). Entry 3290, CMP 3305 (+0.5%). Trailing SL 3210 → 3245 (1.8% below CMP, honors 1% gap floor). Auto sector strongest today. Target 3430 intact. Risk now ~60 (vs 80) on 25 sh, well within budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending OPEN BUY 600 @ 133.50 placed 354 min ago — has not filled, indicating price did not retrace to limit. Per ORDER HYGIENE, leaving it alone (do not stack a second). If unfilled by 2:30 PM, will cancel. No new action."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.66,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +5.7% lock. CMP 1058 has 1.6% room. Holding for target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor. Gold +1.16% today on safe-haven bid."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 = breakeven+. Already at 1% trail-gap floor; no tightening."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Banking firm, thesis intact. SL 206 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from entry 4575 to 4600 to lock small gain; 1.3% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stellar Q4. SL 1420 is the floor; CMP 1440 has 1.4% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 at breakeven+. Q4 blowout. Target 7400 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat day. Q4 board meeting mid-late May; will reassess as date firms."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +30% PAT. SL 358 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings May 8 — within binary window, but position small (~4.3%) and SL 1675 caps 3% tail. Acceptable per rule 11(c)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive, Q4 strong. SL 800 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "reasoning": "Auto leader on record FY26. Trail SL from 3210 to 3245 (1.8% below CMP) to lock breakeven-plus."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M, HAL, NAVINFLUOR, ADANIPORTS, PNBHOUSING are all working winners — keep adding to monitoring not new positions. CAMS (+9% post-Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%) and CHOLAHLDNG already represent Financial Services cluster — already overweight, no add. VEDL demerger price-discovery noise + promoter pledge = pass. Auto cluster (M&M held + GABRIEL watching) — Gabriel PE 59x with Q3 PAT decline doesn't justify adding to auto cluster beyond M&M. TITAGARH already held in Capital Goods alongside HAL — cluster cap reached for capgoods.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 66% deployed, well diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL, CHOLAHLDNG ~22%), Defence/Capgoods (HAL, TITAGARH ~10%), Auto (M&M ~8%), Realty (SOBHA ~5%), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR ~5%), Logistics (ADANIPORTS ~5%), FMCG (MARICO ~5%), Gold (GOLDBEES ~5%). 7 of 12 positions in profit. No new entries today — focus is trailing SLs on winners. Cash 34% gives runway for tomorrow if pullback offers cleaner setups. CHOLAHLDNG May 8 binary watch. HAL May 14 board meeting — will plan exit/risk-trim by May 12-13 if held into the window."
}
